name: schema-registry-dag-schema-publisher
description: T194 SchemaPublisher — TRANSACTION archetype. OCC-guarded publish: getDocumentWithVersion → storeDocumentWithOCC. OCC_CONFLICT → emit SchemaPublishConflict. Stores schemaVersion pin on document. DNA-8: audit before emit.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: OCC fetch-then-store guard, OCC_CONFLICT routing to SchemaPublishConflict, schemaVersion pin on document, DNA-8 audit-before-emit
Retrieve TRANSACTION arch pattern + occ-publish-gate + schema-version-pin + conflict-routing + audit-before-emit patterns for T194
Break T194 into: consume SchemaQueued → getDocumentWithVersion → storeDocumentWithOCC (schemaVersion pinned) → OCC_CONFLICT→SchemaPublishConflict | success→storeDocument(audit) → emit SchemaPublished

Generate schema-publisher.service.ts — @EventPattern('SchemaQueued'), OCC guard: getDocumentWithVersion() then storeDocumentWithOCC() with schemaVersion field pinned. OCC_CONFLICT → emit SchemaPublishConflict and return. DNA-8: storeDocument(auditRecord) BEFORE emitting SchemaPublished. NEVER store payload without version pin.
Named check validation: occ_fetch_then_store, schema_version_pinned, occ_conflict_emits_publish_conflict, audit_store_before_schema_published, no_emit_before_audit_store
Score generated code 0-100 against T194 iron rules: OCC guard correctness, version pin presence, conflict routing, DNA-8 order compliance
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=occ-fetch-store+version-pinned+audit-before-emit, rejected=store-without-occ OR emit-before-audit OR no-version-pin-on-document. curriculumTier=2.
